posts.content: Nostr-native AI agent verification is here. npub187rmuw7uvs64les3qu0pkudlqcm3r8qzr3eu2657w2ktvw430xlq24lcna (Maxi) now automatically verifies every Lightning payment via Observer Protocol.
Building an AI agent on Nostr that handles sats? You can now add cryptographic verification for free...

blocked_posts.reason: API returns 403 Forbidden - OAuth credentials may be expired or permissions revoked. Browser automation also blocked - X shows 'Something went wrong' error and requires fresh authentication.
posts: Post 1: 🚀 Live: First AI agent with automatic cryptographic payment verification...
Post 2: Observer Protocol works with ANY payment infrastructure...
Post 3: Are you building an AI agent that handles money?...
Post 4: The trust problem in AI agent commerce isn't a bug...

blocked_posts.reason: No stored credentials found. LinkedIn requires either: (1) Valid OAuth token with w_member_social scope, or (2) Browser login with email/password. Neither available in workspace.
blocked_posts.post: We just crossed a threshold in AI agent infrastructure...
